testcase.name: 3130-concept-relationship-node-arcrole-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Arcrole Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different arcroles

variation.name: Concept relationship node for parent-child network
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for parent-child network, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for domain-member network
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the domain-member relationships in the taxonomy's definition linkbase. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for domain-member network, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the domain-member relationships in the taxonomy's definition linkbase.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for which there are no relationships
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. There are no outgoing relationships from the relationship source in the specified arcrole, so only the relationship source itself is included. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for which there are no relationships, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. There are no outgoing relationships from the relationship source in the specified arcrole, so only the relationship source itself is included.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with arcrole expression that evaluates to an invalid URI
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the arcrole using an XPath expression that evaluates to an invalid URI.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an empty arcrole expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the arcrole using an XPath expression that evaluates to an empty URI.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an arcrole expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the arcrole using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one URI.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an arcrole expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The arcrole is specified using an XPath expression.
